violations.description: SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): No dish sanitizer was located by the 3-compartment for use. There were also no drain stoppers present in the sink basins. Because of this it is not possible for proper sanitization of dishes to have been occuring. Critical violation corrected on the spot through training on the topic obtaining a drain stopper and bringing a bottle of chlorine bleach over the dish washing area.

HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Soap and hand drying device (no paper towels) were noted not provided at the hand washing lavatory in the food area. Due to the repeated occurence of this critical violation re-inspection for this critical item will occur by 5-14-26. Soap and paper towels must be at all hand sinks in order for the vioaltion to corrected.
DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Sanitizer test stirps noted not provided.
DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Sanitizer test kit noted not provided. No test strips noted present for chlorine based dish sanitizer.

STORAGE/HANDLING CLEAN EQUIP & UTENSILS (1 pts): Clean dishes noted stored on an absorbent surface in the 3 compartment sink area. Non-absorbent easily cleanable/sanitizable dish racks should be used for properly air drying dishes after wash rinsing and sanitizing in the 3-compartment sink.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Door gasket on small glass front cooler in the breakfast area noted with a refrigerator door gasket in need of replacement.
